purpose: Canonical complex form contract for create/edit, approval, permission, detail, and exception recovery pages.

density_policy.compact: Use for query/filter panels and permission matrices.
density_policy.default: Use for create/edit forms with multiple field groups.
density_policy.spacious: Use only for exception recovery or low-density detail review.

permission_contract.readonly_policy: Readonly values must remain visible and selectable where useful.
permission_contract.disabled_policy: Disabled controls must include a visible reason when permission is the cause.
permission_contract.hidden_policy: Hide fields only when the business role contract explicitly marks the data as not visible.

generation_policy: Create/edit pages require dirty-form protection before navigation.
Approval pages require reason field for reject or return decisions.
Linked filters must define parent field, child field, loading state, and reset policy.
Sticky save bars must not cover field errors, pagination, or the final form section.
